expo.name: CYVhub
expo.description: CYVhub — The UK's smarter B2B same-day courier network for businesses, carriers and drivers.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CYVhub uses your location to show nearby drivers and track your deliveries in real-time.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: CYVhub uses your location to provide live delivery tracking.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CYVhub uses your camera to upload proof of delivery photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CYVhub accesses your photo library to attach delivery images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: CYVhub saves proof of delivery photos to your library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: CYVhub uses your location to provide live delivery tracking.

plugins.photosPermission: CYVhub accesses your photos to attach delivery images.
plugins.cameraPermission: CYVhub uses your camera for proof of delivery photos.
